components.description: Automatically adjusts screen brightness.

components.name: Proximity Sensor
components.description: Turns off screen near your ear during calls.

components.name: NFC Module

components.description: Fast charging controller, more heat.

components.description: Very fast charging for large batteries.

components.name: Stereo Speakers
components.description: Dual speakers for richer sound.

components.name: Microphone

components.name: Dual Noise-Cancelling Mic
components.description: Clearer calls in noisy environments.

components.description: Lightweight OS for budget devices.

components.name: FlowOS 5.0
components.description: Feature rich OS requiring more RAM.

components.name: FlowOS Ultra 6.0
components.description: Latest OS with advanced AI features, needs plenty of RAM.

components.name: Firmware v5.0
components.description: Firmware matched to CoreBoard Pro.

components.description: Firmware matched to CoreBoard Ultra.

components.description: Compact motherboard for small, simple phones.

components.description: Balanced hexa-core CPU for smooth multitasking.

components.name: NanoChip Ultra-Low Power
components.description: Extremely efficient CPU for tiny battery devices.

components.description: Mid-range memory for smoother everyday multitasking.

components.name: RAM 24GB LPDDR5X
components.description: Extreme memory for heavy multitaskers and AI workloads.

components.name: UFS 128GB
components.description: Mid-tier fast storage, good balance of price and speed.

components.name: NVMe SSD 1TB
components.description: Massive, ultra-fast storage for pro users and gamers.

components.name: Li-Po 4000mAh Balanced
components.description: Good middle-ground battery for everyday phones.

components.name: Solid-State 7000mAh
components.description: Next-gen battery chemistry — high capacity with lower heat than Li-Po.

components.name: Foldable AMOLED 90Hz
components.description: Bendable display used in foldable phone designs.

components.name: E-Ink Display 1Hz
components.description: Ultra low-power display, great for battery life but no smooth video.

components.name: Camera 48MP Balanced
components.description: Good mid-range camera with light AI processing.

components.name: Periscope Zoom Camera 50MP
components.description: Telephoto camera for long-distance zoom shots.

components.name: Under-Display Front Camera 16MP
components.description: Hidden selfie camera beneath the screen for a bezel-less look.

components.name: Graphite Sheet Cooling
components.description: Very thin, low-cost cooling sheet for basic thermal spreading.

components.name: WiFi 7 Module
components.description: Latest generation WiFi with very high speed and low latency.

components.name: Bluetooth LE Audio
components.description: Newer Bluetooth audio standard with better efficiency and multi-device support.

components.name: Assisted GPS (A-GPS)
components.description: Uses network data to get a location fix faster, ideal for budget phones.

components.name: Dolby Atmos Quad Speakers
components.description: Premium 4-speaker setup with cinematic surround sound.

components.name: Single Basic Mic
components.description: Very basic single microphone for budget phones.

components.name: Advanced Multi-Rail PMIC
components.description: Manages multiple voltage rails precisely for flagship-level efficiency.

components.name: Basic Single-Rail PMIC
components.description: Simple power regulation suited to entry-level boards.

components.name: Heart Rate Sensor
components.description: Optical sensor for fitness and health tracking apps.

components.name: UV Sensor
components.description: Measures ultraviolet light exposure outdoors.

components.name: Depth Sensor (ToF)
components.description: Measures distance for portrait photo blur and face unlock.

components.name: Standard Button Set
components.description: Volume and power buttons for standard physical control.

components.name: Large Accessible Buttons
components.description: Bigger, easier-to-press buttons ideal for elderly or accessibility-focused phones.

components.name: Programmable Action Button
components.description: Customizable extra button for quick shortcuts (camera, assistant, etc.).

components.name: Single Nano-SIM Slot
components.description: Holds one physical SIM card for cellular network access.

components.name: Dual-SIM Slot
components.description: Supports two SIM cards at once, useful for separating work/personal numbers.

components.name: eSIM Module
components.description: Digital SIM built into the device — no physical card needed, activated remotely.

components.name: Basic ERM Vibration Motor
components.description: Simple spinning motor for basic buzz-style notifications.

components.name: Linear Haptic Motor
components.description: Precise, crisp haptic feedback used in flagship phones for typing and gaming.

components.name: Basic Hardware Driver Pack
components.description: Minimal driver set letting the OS talk to essential hardware.

components.name: Full Sensor & Camera Driver Pack
components.description: Complete driver pack unlocking all sensors, camera features, and fast charging support.

components.name: Integrated Graphics
components.description: Basic graphics built into the CPU, fine for everyday tasks.

components.name: Discrete GPU 4GB
components.description: Dedicated graphics card for gaming and video editing.

components.name: Discrete GPU 8GB Pro
components.description: High-end graphics card for serious gaming and 3D rendering.

components.name: Standard Keyboard & Trackpad
components.description: Basic typing input with a touch trackpad below it.

components.name: RGB Backlit Mechanical Keyboard
components.description: Glowing, clicky keyboard popular with gamers and typists.
